app.title: DPI-Bypass
add.prompt: Which domain do you want to unblock?
add.reachable: This domain is already reachable, no action needed.
add.blocked: This domain appears blocked. Searching for a strategy…
add.solving: Searching for a working strategy (this may take a while)…
add.found: A working strategy was found and saved as '{name}'.
add.foundNote: Your current connection was bound to this profile. If your way of connecting to the internet changes, it may stop working.
add.notFound: Sorry, no working strategy was found on this network.
profiles.empty: No profiles yet. Start from the 'Add Domain' screen.
editor.title: Strategy editor
editor.note: Advanced setting. Wrong values can break the bypass.
monitor.networkChanged: You connected to a different network. The current profile may not work here.
settings.scopeLinux: On Linux the scope is always system-wide.
about.privacy: No telemetry. Traffic content is never read or logged.
about.responsible: This tool is for restoring access to legitimate but blocked platforms. Legal responsibility lies with the user.
